series_metadata.series_description: Records consist of all information, decisions or documentation related to a specific grant program competition or a group of multiple competitions within a grant program competition. Files may include, but not limited to; program regulations, relevant statutes, review agreements, review package and waivers, application technical review plans, funding slates, and other documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: final action is taken on file. ; Electronic: final action is taken on file
